description: R(2+1)D + mixed-domain supervised-contrastive model for end-to-end AI-generated video detection. DVF-trained backbone transferred to AEGIS while retaining DVF and GenVideo.

classifier_head.name: fc
classifier_head.note: supervised baseline head carried in the checkpoint; not used by the prototype eval protocol

projection_head.name: proj_head
projection_head.note: eval/inference operates in this projection space

checkpoint_layout.state_dict_prefix: none (flat r2plus1d_18 keys: stem.*, layer1-4.*, fc.*, proj_head.*)

eval_protocol.method: fixed prototypes: build one real/fake prototype pair as the L2-normalised mean of a labeled support bank in projection space; score each query clip by score = sim_fake - sim_real; decide fake if score >= 0.0
eval_protocol.note: support sets drawn from labeled data of the same datasets; this is a representation/adaptation assessment, not a deployed binary classifier

transfer_lineage: DVF-trained R(2+1)D backbone (from scratch, no Kinetics) -> 3-domain mixed supervised-contrastive fine-tuning (AEGIS target + DVF + GenVideo retention) -> projection-space prototype inference
